name: OpenSSL
description: Toolkit and library for TLS/SSL and general-purpose cryptography. Tool: https://www.openssl.org. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #188 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map OpenSSL output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved OpenSSL output file to parse instead of running it live.
